question: Please provide a primary contact from your company for this research effort — Name
draft: Please provide a primary contact from your company for this research effort — Name（姓名）：该项为本次 IDC MarketScape 研究的主要对接联系人信息，将由腾讯云对接团队/接口人统一填写并确认后提供。

provenance.reasoning: 联系人类题，按政策无需 grounding，写明由腾讯云对接团队/接口人填写。
